title: 📋 7d LIFE — Overview

text.content: 7d LIFE is a chakra-based life coaching app project centered on a 7-petal Flower of Life model. It is conceived as a fully functioning beta web app allowing users to assess, track, and visually explore their life across 7 dimensions using scores, goals, weekly actions, and an animated flower/radar visualization.
